message:
refactor(storage): migrate rusqlite FTS repair + health probe to frankensqlite (3e3qg.1)

Eliminates rusqlite from every hot path in src/storage/sqlite.rs:

- Drop the top-level `use rusqlite::OptionalExtension as RusqliteOptionalExtension` import.
- Delete the now-unused scrub machinery (rusqlite_fts_schema_artifact_rows,
  scrub_fts_schema_via_writable_schema, force_clear/drop_fts_schema_via_rusqlite,
  open_rusqlite_with_busy_timeout, rusqlite_fts_schema_rows, rusqlite_fts_limit_probe,
  read_meta_schema_version_rusqlite). These leaned on PRAGMA writable_schema writes
  which frankensqlite intentionally does not support.
- Reshape the surviving free functions into thin delegations to the existing
  FrankenStorage-native implementations:
    * `materialize_fresh_fts_schema_via_rusqlite` → `FrankenStorage::rebuild_fts_via_frankensqlite`
    * `rebuild_fts_via_rusqlite` → `FrankenStorage::rebuild_fts_via_frankensqlite`
    * `ensure_fts_consistency_via_rusqlite` → `FrankenStorage::ensure_search_fallback_fts_consistency`
  The `_via_rusqlite` names are kept only because existing test-site callers still
  reference them; every call now runs through frankensqlite.
- Rename `probe_database_health_via_rusqlite` → `probe_database_health_via_frankensqlite`
  and reroute it through FrankenConnection + `read_meta_schema_version`.
- Add `#[cfg(test)]`-gated `franken_fts_schema_rows` / `franken_fts_limit_probe`
  helpers and wire the remaining test sites that previously inspected
  sqlite_master via rusqlite through them.
- Expose `FrankenStorage::rebuild_fts_via_frankensqlite` as `pub(crate)` so the
  free-function shims can delegate.

AGENTS.md Rule 2: no `use rusqlite::` remains in src/storage/sqlite.rs outside the
standard-SQLite-fixture write paths that still exercise `PRAGMA writable_schema`
— those stay because frankensqlite's sqlite_master projection is read-only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
